creator: hideo@lastamericanempire.com
text:
--wRRV7LY7NUeQGEoC
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii
 Content-Disposition: inline
 
 Domain changed to mission-base.com. Here's a patch with the new
 MASTER_SITE. If the submitter's site should be added as a backup
 that's fine with me.
 
 Thank you,
 Zach
 
 --wRRV7LY7NUeQGEoC
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii
 Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="libpbl.diff"
 
 --- /usr/ports/databases/libpbl/Makefile	Thu May  4 15:39:59 2006
 +++ libpbl/Makefile	Sun Oct 15 19:33:59 2006
 @@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
  PORTNAME=	libpbl
  PORTVERSION=	1.03
  CATEGORIES=	databases
 -MASTER_SITES=	http://mission.base.com/peter/source/
 +MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mission-base.com/peter/source/
  DISTNAME=	pbl_1_03
  
  MAINTAINER=	hideo@lastamericanempire.com
 
 --wRRV7LY7NUeQGEoC--
